coverage_note: The bundled VKORC1 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from VKORC1 vitamin K recycling, gamma-carboxylation support, warfarin sensitivity, and anticoagulant pharmacogenomics and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000167397: VKORC1 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: VKORC1 findings should be read against vitamin K recycling, gamma-carboxylation support, warfarin sensitivity, and anticoagulant pharmacogenomics; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.
rs9923231 (VKORC1 -1639G>A) is curated as a VKORC1 marker for Warfarin dose-sensitivity context, Vitamin K cycle biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
